# Walkercraft Carpentry

> Professional carpentry and handyman services serving Hamilton, Burlington, Oakville, and the GTHA.

## Owner
Brett Walker, founder (est. 2019). One-man operation based in Hamilton, Ontario.

## Services
- Custom Carpentry: built-in cabinetry, crown moulding, trim, custom shelving and storage
- Exterior Work: deck building and repair, fence installation, exterior repairs and siding
- General Handyman: drywall patching and repair, fixture installation, general maintenance

## Contact
- Phone: (226) 789-6525
- Email: info@walkercraftcarpentry.ca
- Website: https://walkercraftcarpentry.ca

## Service Area
Hamilton, Burlington, Oakville, Ancaster, Dundas, Stoney Creek (Greater Toronto and Hamilton Area)

## Trust Signals
- Fully insured
- Locally owned and operated
- Free estimates
- 50+ projects completed
